description: Read record-change events for a folder or a single record, optionally filtered by field names.

field_names.description: Optional list of exact field names to filter update or change feeds by.
field_names.title: Field Names

folder_id.description: NetHunt folder identifier. Discover valid values with `list_readable_folders` or `list_writable_folders`.
folder_id.title: Folder Id

limit.description: Optional maximum number of items to return when the endpoint supports limiting.
limit.title: Limit

record_id.description: Optional record identifier to narrow a record-change feed to one record.
record_id.title: Record Id

since.description: Optional feed cursor or timestamp accepted by the underlying NetHunt trigger endpoint.
since.title: Since

name: list_record_changes
